title: Wordstones
description: A nerdy take on fast travel
body:
[![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/2qfGFRJJ?label=Latest%20Release&color=a56d2c&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wordstones/version/latest)
[![Requires Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/requires-fabric_api-a56d2c?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Compatible with Sinytra Connector](https://img.shields.io/badge/compatible-sinytra_connector-a56d2c?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

# About

**Wordstones** is a Waystones inspired mod that adds a new means of personal teleportation, new progression to Strongholds and more

# Features

- **Wordstones**, the namesake of the mod, are a new block that can be used to travel to any other Wordstone
- **Drop Boxes**, a new storage block that has a dedicated inventory for each player
- **Tomes**, a new resource item obtained from Strongholds used for crafting Wordstones and Enchanting Tables

> For a full list of features, see the [Wiki](https://codeberg.org/sindercube/wordstones/wiki)
